items.name: check_doc_required
items.signature: pub fn check_doc_required( file_ctx: &FileContext, lines: &[&str], _cfg: &Config, issues: &mut Vec<Issue>, path: &Path, )
items.doc: Check that exported components/structs have `///` doc comments.

items.doc: Check for hardcoded hex colors and px values in component files.

items.doc: Check that global/definition files have no control flow.
